auth.login_validation: Please enter your email or phone number and password
auth.branding_desc: The premier Digital Signage system. Monitor your campaign performance, control content, and interact with your audience in real-time with speed and security.
auth.register_subtitle: Join the SabaPost network to manage your ads smartly
auth.agree_terms: By creating your account, you agree to the
auth.register_success: Account created successfully! You can now login.
auth.register_validation: Please fill in all required fields
auth.forgot_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.reset_sent: Reset link sent! Check your email.
auth.join_network_desc: Start managing your advertising screens or creating your campaigns easily via a specialized platform that meets all your needs.
auth.reset_sent_desc_1: We have sent an email to
auth.reset_sent_desc_2: . Please check your email and follow the instructions.
auth.privacy_policy_desc: At SabaPost, we place the utmost importance on protecting your privacy and personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when using our platform.
auth.privacy_sec1_desc: We collect information you provide directly to us when registering, such as name, email, and phone number. As well as information about how you use the system.
auth.privacy_sec2_desc: We use your information to provide and improve our services, process payments for ads, provide specialized technical support, and to communicate with you regarding important updates.
auth.privacy_sec3_desc: We use advanced security measures and high-level encryption to protect your information from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.
auth.terms_desc: Welcome to SabaPost platform. By using our platform, you agree to be bound by the following terms of use. Please read them carefully.
auth.terms_sec1_desc: Using the system for illegal purposes or uploading advertising content that violates public morals or applicable laws is prohibited. The administration reserves the right to reject any ad without giving reasons.
auth.terms_sec2_desc: All amounts paid for approved ad campaigns are non-refundable. If the ad is rejected by the administration before being displayed, the amount will be refunded to your platform balance.
auth.terms_sec3_desc: The platform is not responsible for any indirect damages or loss of profits resulting from the use or inability to use our services.

sessions.manage_sessions_admin_desc: View and monitor all user sessions and terminate any suspicious ones.
sessions.manage_sessions_desc: View your connected devices and terminate unknown sessions with one click.
sessions.security_alert: Security Alert: {{count}} active sessions from other devices.
sessions.security_alert_action: If this wasn't you, terminate them immediately and change your password.

sessions.no_sessions_sys: No active sessions found currently in the system
sessions.load_failed_table_desc: An error occurred while fetching session data

sessions.block_warning_desc_1: You are about to block the device (

analytics.page_desc: Fill rate, impressions, and financial performance reports for your screens
analytics.room_for_improvement: There is idle time that can be improved
analytics.total_impressions_note: Total ad impressions on your screens
analytics.fill_rate_desc: Fill Rate — Paid Ads vs Idle Time
analytics.screen_performance_desc: Fill rate and impressions details per owned screen
analytics.fill_rate_explanation: Fill rate is the percentage of time your screen displays paid ads compared to the total operating time. The closer to 100%, the better — meaning your screen is busy with revenue-generating ads.
analytics.fetch_error: An error occurred while fetching data

reports.maintenance_report_desc: Extract technical reports on screen status and downtime
reports.maintenance_report_disclaimer: This report is intended for the maintenance and technical support team to monitor screen performance and does not contain any financial data. The report is automatically generated.
reports.technical_reports_instructions: Select the screen and time period, then click the 'Extract' button to view and print the technical maintenance report.
reports.screen_report_desc: Filter data to generate custom screen performance report.
reports.auto_generated_disclaimer: This report is auto-generated based on playback logs.
reports.reports_ready_desc: Set filters on the right and click extract to view detailed report.
reports.no_report: Select a screen and date range to generate report

dashboard.try_changing_filters: Try changing filters or clearing search
dashboard.cleanup_confirm: Are you sure to clear logs older than {daysLabel}?
dashboard.ticket_system_soon: Ticketing system will be available soon

screens.confirm_delete_screen: Are you sure you want to delete this screen?
screens.command_sent_error: An error occurred while sending the command
screens.screen_details_subtitle: Track the performance and status of this screen in detail
screens.active_ads_subtitle: Campaigns currently displaying on this screen
screens.screen_schedule_subtitle: Working hours and times when the price is multiplied
screens.cmd_sent_success: Command sent successfully, waiting for screen response
screens.confirm_cmd_message: Are you sure you want to send the ({command}) command to the screen?
screens.click_map_to_select: Click on the map to select the exact screen location
screens.screen_name_placeholder: e.g., Al-Saeed Mall Screen - Main Entrance
screens.location_auto_add: This location will be automatically added to the database
screens.price_desc: Price for showing an ad for a full day
screens.peak_hours_desc: Specify times when the price multiplies. It returns to base price ({price}$) automatically.
screens.no_peak_slots: No peak slots added — Base pricing always applies
screens.upload_formats_desc: JPG · PNG · WEBP — Click to upload or drag here
screens.remove_screen_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this screen? All linked campaigns will be immediately stopped.
screens.default_password_note: A default password (password123) will be set for the owner upon creation. They can change it later from the owner's app.

ads.report_disclaimer: This report represents the net platform returns deducted from advertising campaigns as an operating commission based on the commission rate specified in system settings. The report is automated and does not require a signature.
ads.confirm_delete_ad: Are you sure you want to delete this ad?
ads.assign_campaign_to_screen_required: Campaign must be assigned to at least one screen
ads.campaign_uploaded_successfully_review: Campaign uploaded successfully and is under review
ads.please_select_at_least_one_screen: Please select at least one screen
ads.title: Ads
ads.ad_production_desc: Upload the visual material to be displayed to viewers
ads.pricing_desc: Review the cost details for the campaign
ads.estimated_cost_note: The cost shown is an estimated cost. Discounts may apply based on campaign duration, and final cost depends on each screen's size and location category.
ads.calculate_cost_note: Click calculate cost above to see the final total before submitting the campaign.
ads.target_timing_desc: Determine precise display periods during the day
ads.start_date_desc: The day the ad goes live for the audience
ads.fill_screens_and_dates_before_cost: Please select screens and dates before calculating cost
ads.basic_info_desc: Enter the campaign title and advertiser details
ads.assign to advertiser note: Note: If no advertiser is selected, the campaign will be considered an internal system ad.
ads.campaign_title_note: Write a clear name describing the campaign
ads.scheduling_density_desc: Determine the campaign duration and display density
ads.spatial_targeting_desc: Choose the screens that will display your ad
ads.must_calculate_cost_first: You must calculate the cost first before submitting the campaign
ads.live_ad_desc: Monitor and manage all active ad campaigns on the SabaPost screen network in real-time.
ads.waiting_payment_desc: Campaign will be approved and moved to "Waiting Payment" for the advertiser to pay fees.
ads.active_desc: Campaign will be activated and start broadcasting on target screens immediately.
ads.pause_desc: Campaign will be paused and won't appear on screens until resumed.
ads.reject_desc: Are you sure you want to reject campaign? Please provide a reason for the advertiser.
ads.delete_campaign_msg: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this campaign? This action cannot be undone.

financial.ledger_desc: Manage and monitor all financial transactions and advertiser accounts
financial.no_transactions_yet: No transactions have been recorded yet
financial.manual_record_desc: Use this form to record a manual financial transaction.
financial.ledger empty export alert: The financial ledger is empty for export
financial.e_wallet_desc: Track your screen earnings, monitor your investments growth, and easily request payouts.
financial.transactions_desc: Earnings details for each screen along with payout and payment logs are shown here.
financial.payout_desc: You can withdraw your earnings once they exceed the minimum ($50). Payout requests are processed within 2-3 business days and transferred to your registered bank account.
financial.report_disclaimer: This report is auto-generated from the SabaPost digital signage management system. It is a certified financial statement and does not require a manual stamp or signature to authenticate the figures.

admin.security_delete_warning: This will permanently delete the payment gateway and revoke its keys. Past payments will not be affected. Do you want to continue?
admin.audit_logs_desc: This log is authentic and reflects the latest security interventions at the configuration level.

admin.screens_subtitle: Monitor displays geographically and track their real-time operational status.
